global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with a clear focus on the messaging and call to action.
global.main_message: Track every euro with no hidden fees.

elements.label: Blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the canvas, providing a vibrant base for the other elements.

elements.label: ClearLedger logo
elements.description: The logo 'ClearLedger' is displayed prominently at the top, featuring a clean and modern font.

elements.label: Main message
elements.description: The text 'Track every euro' is bold and centered, conveying the primary message of the ad.

elements.label: Subtext
elements.description: The phrase 'No hidden fees' is smaller and positioned below the main message, providing additional information.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: The button 'Start now' is centered and visually distinct, encouraging user interaction.

elements.label: Decorative element
elements.description: An abstract shape in the background adds visual interest without specific meaning.

elements.label: Decorative element

elements.label: Decorative element

elements.label: Call to action

elements.label: ClearLedger logo
elements.description: The logo 'ClearLedger' is positioned at the top left, representing the brand.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small 'SALE' badge is located at the top right, indicating a promotional offer.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: The 'UGC' label is positioned at the top, suggesting user-generated content.
